name: Booking Field Extractor
summary: All 7 booking artifacts ingested successfully via IngestBooking. ListBookings returned 7 bookings with correct types, non-empty raw_text, and AI-parsed summaries. All 7 ExtractBookingField queries returned specific, accurate answers cross-referenced against source artifacts. Negative test (irrelevant hotel wifi question on flight booking) correctly declined to hallucinate. Multi-hostel disambiguation for Hanoi check-in time was accurate. One minor observation: hostel multi-property booking has empty hotelDetails in the structured response (properties stored in detailsJson instead).

ux_issues.description: Hostel multi-property booking returns empty hotelDetails object in ListBookings/IngestBooking response. The 3-property data is only available in detailsJson as a JSON string, not in the structured hotelDetails proto field. Frontend consumers would need to parse detailsJson to get property-level details for multi-stop hostel bookings.

test_9_flight_terminal_departure.question: What terminal and what time does my outbound flight depart?
test_9_flight_terminal_departure.answer: Your outbound flight (DL 472) departs from Terminal 4 at JFK airport at 6:45 PM EDT on June 15, 2026.

test_10_hotel_cancellation.question: What is the cancellation policy?
test_10_hotel_cancellation.answer: Free cancellation is available until June 12, 2026 (11:59 PM CEST). If cancelled after this time, the first night (EUR 289.00) will be charged. In the case of a no-show, the full stay will be charged.

test_11_activity_meeting_point.question: What is the meeting point and what should I bring?
test_11_activity_meeting_point.answer: The meeting point is at the Nativity Facade entrance (Carrer de la Marina side), located at C/ de la Marina, 253, 08013 Barcelona; look for a guide with an orange 'Barcelona Expert Tours' sign and arrive 15 minutes early. You should bring a valid photo ID, comfortable walking shoes, sunscreen, a water bottle, and your booking confirmation. Additionally, ensure your shoulders and knees are covered as a dress code is enforced.
test_11_activity_meeting_point.expected_meeting_point: Nativity Facade entrance, Carrer de la Marina side

test_12_car_insurance_fuel.question: What insurance is included and what is the fuel policy?
test_12_car_insurance_fuel.answer: The rental includes Super CDW (Collision Damage Waiver) with zero excess and Theft Protection. The fuel policy is 'Full-to-Full', meaning the car is provided with a full tank and should be returned with a full tank to avoid extra charges.

test_13_hostel_hanoi_checkin.question: What time is check-in at the Hanoi hostel?
test_13_hostel_hanoi_checkin.answer: Check-in at the Hanoi Old Quarter Hostel is on Monday, June 1, 2026, between 2:00 PM and 10:00 PM.

test_14_ryokan_meals_dinner.question: What meals are included and what time is dinner?
test_14_ryokan_meals_dinner.answer: The stay includes a Kaiseki dinner and a traditional Japanese breakfast. Dinner is served in-room at either 6:00 PM or 6:30 PM (preference to be confirmed at check-in).

test_15_tour_tastings_dietary.question: How many food tastings are included and what dietary accommodations are available?
test_15_tour_tastings_dietary.answer: The tour includes 12 food tastings across 3 markets and 4 street food stands. Regarding dietary accommodations, the tour can provide vegetarian and gluten-free options with at least 48 hours' notice, and vegan substitutions are available for most stops.

test_16_irrelevant_question.question: What is the hotel wifi password?
test_16_irrelevant_question.answer: The provided source text is a flight confirmation for Delta Air Lines and does not contain information regarding a hotel wifi password.

notes: Exceptionally clean run. All 16 test cases passed. The AI extraction pipeline is highly accurate across all 7 booking types. Multi-hostel disambiguation worked perfectly — the AI correctly isolated Hanoi-specific check-in times without confusing with Hue or Saigon properties. Negative test showed strong hallucination resistance. The only minor finding is P2: multi-property hostel bookings don't populate the structured hotelDetails proto field, requiring clients to parse detailsJson for property-level data.
